title: Kuwait closes airspace, Israel warns of launches from Lebanon after U.S strikes in Iran
summary_full: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.
summary_public: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.
